title: The Allies Push Forward
description: Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Luffy, Galley-La shipwright, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Either way....I'm out of the group...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've gotta fight no matter what!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Uo--!! What the? What's this mizuSeme*!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're sorry, bosses... We're sorry... UOO....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: One day, however, on some island,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The two bosses began to duel.

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: went out to sea to get them...

summary: Oimo, Kashii, Galley-La, and the Franky Family help the Straw Hats break through the government’s front line.
